name: Guacamole
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the metal chopping blade in your food processor.
2. Add the onion, lemon juice, mayonnaise, chili peppers, and salt to the work bowl.
3. Run the processor continuously for 10 seconds until the onion is finely chopped and the other ingredients are well blended.
4. Using a tablespoon, transfer large chunks of avocado into the work bowl.
5. Discard each avocado pit thoroughly.
6. Distribute the avocado pieces around the chopping blade.
7. Pulse the food processor two or three times until the mixture is combined but retains some texture (like cottage cheese).
